name: Water
summary: You can manipulate water and mist and ice, conjure creatures of water, and resist cold.

granted_power_l1.name: Icicle
granted_power_l1.summary: As a standard action, you can fire an icicle from your finger, targeting any foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack. The icicle deals 1d6 points of cold damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.

higher_level_powers.summary: Resist cold 10; increases to 20 at L12; immunity at L20.
